contents:
Require Import
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.abstract_algebra
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.orders
  HoTT.Classes.theory.groups
  HoTT.Classes.theory.rings.
Generalizable Variables R Rle Rlt R1le R1lt.

Context `{IsCRing R} `{!PartialOrder Rle}
    (plus_spec : forall z, OrderPreserving (z +))
    (mult_spec : forall x y, PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y) ->
      PropHolds (0 ≤ x * y)).

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, x ≤ y -> {z : R & y = x + z}

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, x ≤ y -> {z : R & y = x + z}

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x * y)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x0 * y0)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x * y)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 ≤ x0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ y0) -> PropHolds (0 ≤ x0 * y0)

contents:
Context `{IsCRing R} `{!StrictOrder Rlt}
    (plus_spec : forall z, StrictlyOrderPreserving (z +))
    (mult_spec : forall x y, PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) ->
      PropHolds (0 < x * y)).

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, x < y -> {z : R & y = x + z}

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, x < y -> {z : R & y = x + z}

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

contents:
Context `{IsCRing R} `{Apart R} `{!PseudoOrder Rlt}
    (plus_spec : forall z, StrictlyOrderPreserving (z +))
    (mult_ext : StrongBinaryExtensionality (.*.))
    (mult_spec : forall x y, PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) ->
      PropHolds (0 < x * y)).

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, ~ (y < x) -> {z : R & y = x + z}

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, ~ (y < x) -> {z : R & y = x + z}

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

forall x0 y0 : R,
PropHolds (0 < x0) -> PropHolds (0 < y0) -> PropHolds (0 < x0 * y0)

contents:
Context `{IsCRing R} `{Apart R} `{!FullPseudoOrder Rle Rlt}
    (plus_spec : forall z, StrictlyOrderPreserving (z +))
    (mult_ext : StrongBinaryExtensionality (.*.))
    (mult_spec : forall x y, PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) ->
      PropHolds (0 < x * y)).

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, x ≤ y <-> ~ (y < x)

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R, x ≤ y <-> ~ (y < x)

hypotheses.type:
forall x y : R,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

contents: Lemma flip_le_negate x y : -y ≤ -x <-> x ≤ y.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : R, a ≤ b -> - b ≤ - a

hypotheses.type: forall a b : R, a ≤ b -> - b ≤ - a

goals.conclusion: forall a b : R, a ≤ b -> - b ≤ - a

contents:
transitivity (-a + -b + a);[apply eq_le|
    transitivity (-a + -b + b);[|apply eq_le]].

goals.conclusion: - a - b + a ≤ - a - b + b
- a - b + a ≤ - a - b + b

hypotheses.type: forall a b : R, a ≤ b -> - b ≤ - a
forall a b : R, a ≤ b -> - b ≤ - a

contents: Lemma flip_le_minus_r (x y z : R) : z ≤ y - x <-> z + x ≤ y.

goals.conclusion: z ≤ y - x <-> z + x ≤ y
z ≤ y - x <-> z + x ≤ y

contents: Lemma flip_le_minus_l (x y z : R) : y - x ≤ z <-> y ≤ z + x.

goals.conclusion: y - x ≤ z <-> y ≤ z + x
y - x ≤ z <-> y ≤ z + x
y - x ≤ z <-> y ≤ z - - x

contents: Lemma flip_nonneg_minus (x y : R) : 0 ≤ y - x <-> x ≤ y.
Lemma flip_nonpos_minus (x y : R) : y - x ≤ 0 <-> y ≤ x.
Lemma nonneg_minus_compat (x y z : R) : 0 ≤ z -> x ≤ y -> x - z ≤ y.

goals.conclusion: 0 ≤ z -> x ≤ y -> x - z ≤ y
0 ≤ z -> x ≤ y -> x - z ≤ y

contents: Lemma nonneg_minus_compat_back (x y z : R) : 0 ≤ z -> x ≤ y - z -> x ≤ y.

goals.conclusion: 0 ≤ z -> x ≤ y - z -> x ≤ y
0 ≤ z -> x ≤ y - z -> x ≤ y

contents: Lemma flip_lt_negate x y : -y < -x <-> x < y.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : R, a < b -> - b < - a

hypotheses.type: forall a b : R, a < b -> - b < - a

goals.conclusion: forall a b : R, a < b -> - b < - a
- a - b + a < - a - b + b
- a - b + a < - a - b + b

hypotheses.type: forall a b : R, a < b -> - b < - a
forall a b : R, a < b -> - b < - a

contents: Lemma flip_lt_negate_r x y : y < - x -> x < - y.

goals.conclusion: (fun r : R => r < - x -> x < - y) y

contents: Lemma flip_lt_negate_l x y : - x < y -> - y < x.

goals.conclusion: (fun r : R => - x < r -> - y < x) y

contents: Lemma flip_lt_minus_r (x y z : R) : z < y - x <-> z + x < y.

goals.conclusion: z < y - x <-> z + x < y
z < y - x <-> z + x < y

contents: Lemma flip_lt_minus_l (x y z : R) : y - x < z <-> y < z + x.

goals.conclusion: y - x < z <-> y < z + x
y - x < z <-> y < z + x
y - x < z <-> y < z - - x

contents: Lemma flip_pos_minus (x y : R) : 0 < y - x <-> x < y.
Lemma flip_neg_minus (x y : R) : y - x < 0 <-> y < x.
Lemma pos_minus_compat (x y z : R) : 0 < z -> x < y -> x - z < y.

goals.conclusion: 0 < z -> x < y -> x - z < y
0 < z -> x < y -> x - z < y

contents: Lemma pos_minus_lt_compat_r x z : 0 < z <-> x - z < x.
Lemma pos_minus_lt_compat_l x z : 0 < z <-> - z + x < x.

Definition positive_apart_zero (z : R) (Pz : 0 < z) : z ≶ 0
    := pseudo_order_lt_apart_flip 0 z Pz.

Definition negative_apart_zero (z : R) (Nz : z < 0) : z ≶ 0
    := pseudo_order_lt_apart z 0 Nz.

Context `{IsCRing R1} `{!SemiRingOrder R1le} `{IsCRing R2} `{R2le : Le R2}
    `{is_mere_relation R2 R2le}.

Lemma projected_ring_order (f : R2 -> R1) `{!IsSemiRingPreserving f} `{!IsInjective f}
    : (forall x y, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y) -> SemiRingOrder R2le.

goals.conclusion: (forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y) -> SemiRingOrder R2le
(forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y) -> SemiRingOrder R2le

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R2, x ≤ y -> {z : R2 & y = x + z}

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 ≤ y0 <-> f x0 ≤ f y0
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 ≤ y0 <-> f x0 ≤ f y0
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 ≤ y0 <-> f x0 ≤ f y0

contents: Lemma reflecting_preserves_nonneg : (forall x, 0 ≤ f x -> 0 ≤ x) -> OrderReflecting f.

goals.conclusion: (forall x : R1, 0 ≤ f x -> 0 ≤ x) -> OrderReflecting f
(forall x : R1, 0 ≤ f x -> 0 ≤ x) -> OrderReflecting f

hypotheses.type: forall x : R1, 0 ≤ f x -> 0 ≤ x
forall x : R1, 0 ≤ f x -> 0 ≤ x
forall x0 : R1, 0 ≤ f x0 -> 0 ≤ x0
forall x0 : R1, 0 ≤ f x0 -> 0 ≤ x0
forall x0 : R1, 0 ≤ f x0 -> 0 ≤ x0

contents: Lemma preserves_ge_negate1 `{!OrderPreserving f} x : - 1 ≤ x -> - 1 ≤ f x.
Lemma preserves_le_negate1 `{!OrderPreserving f} x : x ≤ - 1 -> f x ≤ - 1.

Context `{IsCRing R1} `{!StrictSemiRingOrder R1lt} `{IsCRing R2} `{R2lt : Lt R2}
    `{is_mere_relation R2 lt}.

Lemma projected_strict_ring_order (f : R2 -> R1) `{!IsSemiRingPreserving f} :
    (forall x y, x < y <-> f x < f y) -> StrictSemiRingOrder R2lt.

goals.conclusion: (forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y) -> StrictSemiRingOrder R2lt
(forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y) -> StrictSemiRingOrder R2lt

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y

goals.conclusion:
forall x y : R2,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 < y0 <-> f x0 < f y0
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 < y0 <-> f x0 < f y0

goals.conclusion: f z + f x < f z + f y

hypotheses.type: forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 < y0 <-> f x0 < f y0
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 < y0 <-> f x0 < f y0

goals.conclusion:
forall x y : R2,
PropHolds (0 < x) -> PropHolds (0 < y) -> PropHolds (0 < x * y)

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 < y0 <-> f x0 < f y0
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 < y0 <-> f x0 < f y0
forall x0 y0 : R2, x0 < y0 <-> f x0 < f y0

contents: apply pos_mult_compat; rewrite <-(preserves_0 (f:=f)); apply P; trivial.

goals.conclusion: (forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y) -> PseudoSemiRingOrder R2lt
(forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y) -> PseudoSemiRingOrder R2lt

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y

contents: pose proof (@pseudo_order_apart R1 H0 R1lt pseudo_srorder_strict : IsApart R1).

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y

contents: intros x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂ E.

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
f x₁ * f y₁ ≶ f x₂ * f y₂

goals.conclusion:
(forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y) ->
(forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y) -> FullPseudoSemiRingOrder R2le R2lt

(forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y) ->
(forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y) -> FullPseudoSemiRingOrder R2le R2lt

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y

goals.conclusion: forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> ~ (y < x)

hypotheses.type: forall x y : R2, x ≤ y <-> f x ≤ f y
forall x y : R2, x < y <-> f x < f y
